channel.title: Fritz Neumann on Ric - An unknown artist
channel.description: Recent content in Fritz Neumann on Ric - An unknown artist

item.title: Fritz Neumann Boats
item.description: Short description: A colourised etching of boats by Fritz Neumann. Notes: Found on eBay

item.title: Fritz Neumann Heron
item.description: Short description: A colourised print of terriers by Fritz Neumann. Notes: Found on eBay

item.title: Fritz Neumann Heron
item.description: Short description: A colourised etching of a heron by Fritz Neumann. Notes: Found on eBay

item.title: Fritz Neumann biographies
item.description: I’ve found two Fritz Neumann biographies and a change to the German Wikipedia: Freundeskreis Bildende Kunst Oldenburg e.V. By Dr. Arie Hartog of the Gerhard-Marcks-House Bremen: German original article Automatic English translation (by Google Translate) askART The full article requires a registration / subscription: Artist Biography & Facts: Fritz Neumann Wikipedia There also has been a change to the German Wikipedia, adding the Ric pseudonym to Fritz Neumann. But there is still no article on him.

item.title: Fritz Neumann Poodle
item.description: Short description: A etching of a poodle by Fritz Neumann. Notes: Found on a fleamarket in Hannover for 15€

item.title: Cover of Genossenschaftsfamilie Nr. 16 August 1935
item.description: Short description: This seems to be a cover of an issue of “Genossenschaftfamilie” with an painting by Fritz Neumann. It was a company magazine of the GEG (Deutsche Großeinkaufs-Gesellschaft) from Hamburg. Notes: More Information on the publication is available in German.

item.title: Fritz Neumann Birch Way
item.description: Short description: A path lined with birch trees, coastal ‘moorlands’ of sandy soil of North German Plain (Geest). Notes: On the back it’s noted that this was a gift in 1949.

item.title: Sea Gulls - Fritz Neumann
item.description: Short description: Two sea gulls in flight Notes: Taken from eBay Image by Mark Strong of Meibohm Fine Arts . The description on eBay is very interesting, there will be a post about it.

item.title: Under the Sea - Fritz Neumann
item.description: Short description: Two colorized etchings of fishes and corals signed by Fritz Neumann. Notes: These can be found on eBay (listing 1 and listing 2 ) Images by Mark Strong of Meibohm Fine Arts . The description on eBay is very interesting, there is a post about it.

item.title: Another work of sailing boats by Fritz Neumann
item.description: Short description: Another work of sailing boats by Fritz Neumann. Notes: Found on eBay . There is a sticker on the back, but it’s unreadable. Interestingly, the picture is attributed to a Ric Neumann

item.title: Good old Fritz in Paris
item.description: Short description: Paris, Montmartre with the Basilica of the Sacred Heart of Paris , commonly known as Sacré-Cœur Basilica in the background. Notes: Found by Wolfgang Barina on eBay Kleinanzeigen

item.title: Another wrong attribution
item.description: Every regular reader will spot the error in the screen shot above really quick: This page is about Fritz Neumann (1881 – 1918) The second image shows a sailing boat, which is probably by another Fritz Neumann, especially since this one died 1918 and the construction of the „Laboe Naval Memorial“ , which can be seen in the background, was started in 1927… There is a higher resolution image available at veryimportantlot.

item.title: An answer from Rosenthal
item.description: A while a ago I’ve added a post showing a painted tile painted by Fritz Neumann and produced by Rosenthal . Since the company has quite a history they also offer a archive research service. In spring 2019 I’ve send them an inquiry about the history of this particular product and the artist, Today I got an answer. Since I don’t have their permission I don’t quote the reply here. The raw facts:

item.title: Print of a foal by Fritz Neumann
item.description: Short description: A colourised print of a foal by Fritz Neumann Notes: Found on eBay

item.title: A german shepherd (Fritz Neumann)
item.description: Short description : A German Shepherd Notes : Bought in Göttingen.

item.title: An etching of a wind mill by (some) Fritz Neumann
item.description: Short description : An etching of a wind mill by (some) Fritz Neumann Notes : Taken from eBay , probably not “our” Fritz Neumann.

item.title: Two prints by Fritz Neumann
item.description: Short description : Two prints by Fritz Neumann, sailings boats and a black-headed gull. Notes : Works by our Fritz Neumann with typical maritime subjects.
Short description: A postcard by Fritz Neumann Notes: Found on Ansichtskarten-Center

item.title: The different signatures of our Fritz Neumann
item.description: One possibility to distinguish between our different Fritz Neumann’s is to compare the signature. The following list shows examples of Fritz Neumanns signatures, the source images are linked in the image caption: Signature our Fritz Neumann, taken from this post Signature our Fritz Neumann, taken from this post Signature our Fritz Neumann, taken from this post Signature our Fritz Neumann, taken from this post

item.title: Two prints from one plate (Fritz Neumann)
item.description: Short description : Two prints from one plate, another fox terrier. Notes : The first is taken from the Linosaurus Blog . Note the mark under the signature, Holsten Gate variant. The second is taken from Cofart.be . The colourisation above the eye is different. Note that the signature is different and it has a title (”Ali Baba”), no stamp mark visible.

item.title: A kitten by Fritz Neumann
item.description: Short description : A kitten Notes : Taken from eBay . this on got the Holsten Gate variant of the mark.

item.title: A dachshund (Fritz Neumann)
item.description: Short description : A dachshund Notes : Taken from Cofart.be . The stamp mark is clearly visible.

item.title: Two dogs - fox terrier (Fritz Neumann)
item.description: Short description : Two dogs, fox terrier. Notes : Taken from eBay . This one is quite interesting, it’s attributed to Hermann Fritz Neumann and should be quite old. It also features the stamp mark, but in another form: The letters “J”, “C” and “B” are not overlapping, and are put in the middle of the Holstentor .

item.title: Dürers "Praying Hands" - Fritz Neumann
item.description: Short description: An etching after Albrecht Dürer’s “Preying Hands” by Fritz Neumann. Even if the motif and style doesn’t match, the signature does. Notes: No blind stamp visible.

item.title: Sailing boats in a harbour (Fritz Neumann)
item.description: Short Description : Sailing boats in a harbour / near a shore Notes : Another maritime subject by Fritz Neumann, on the back is a sticker reading “Echt Aquarell” (Original aquarelle). But this is clearly a colourised print, since there is a platemark.

item.title: Another work by our Fritz Neumann
item.description: Description : Another work by our Fritz Neumann, look at the signature and the stamp mark on the third picture. Notes : Taken from eBay Kleinanzeigen

item.title: Am Wind (Fritz Neumann)
item.description: Description : A tile with a print called “Am Wind” made by Rosenthal Notes : Found on lauritz.com . There are many other examples available on the net (Google Image Search ). According to this page , the mark shown had been used by Rosenthal between 1939 and 1956. Another hint from this page is confirming this by the used style of the underline. Update: Rosenthal answered my inquiry

item.title: A signature of Fritz Neumann (1881 - 1919)
item.description: A signature of Fitz Neumann (1881 - 1919), taken from findartinfo.com . His subjects are mostly Cossacks, he was a painter.
